tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: Its national flower is the rose, and its patron saint is St George.
The maple leaf appears in the centre of its red and white flag.
The kangaroo and the emu support the shield on its coat of arms.
The lion is its national animal and the three lions feature on its football badge.
The beaver is one of its official national animals, valued for the old fur trade.
The golden wattle is its official national floral emblem.
The bald eagle is its national bird, shown on the Great Seal.
Its capital city is London, on the River Thames.
The Stars and Stripes flag has fifty stars, one for each state.
Its largest cities include Sydney and Melbourne, though Canberra is the capital.
The cherry blossom is its best-known flower, and Mount Fuji its famous peak.
The rose is its national flower, named the official floral emblem in 1986.
